task_description:
设计一个《无畏契约》(Valorant) 战绩分析网页的主页设计图 (PNG)。要求：1) 设计整体风格要符合无畏契约游戏的科幻/电竞风格，配色用深色系+蓝色/紫色高光；2) 主页需要包含：顶部导航栏、玩家基本信息卡片、近期战绩统计、排名分布图表、代理人使用数据；3) 图片格式为 PNG，尺寸 1920x1080，保存到 ~/Desktop/ 目录。

【重要】保存文件时必须使用实际路径：/Users/lzz/Desktop，禁止用 /Users/xxx/ 或 $(whoami)。

params.code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as patches
from matplotlib.patches import Rectangle, FancyBboxPatch, Circle
import numpy as np
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import io

# 创建高分辨率图像 1920x1080
width, height = 1920, 1080
fig = plt.figure(figsize=(20, 11.25), dpi=96, facecolor='#0a0e27')
ax = fig.add_subplot(111)
ax.set_xlim(0, width)
ax.set_ylim(0, height)
ax.axis('off')

# ===== 颜色定义（Valorant 风格）=====
BG_DARK = '#0a0e27'
BG_CARD = '#1a1f3a'
BG_ACCENT = '#0f1d2d'
COLOR_BLUE = '#00d4ff'  # 青蓝
COLOR_PURPLE = '#a335ee'  # 紫色
COLOR_GOLD = '#ffd700'  # 金色
TEXT_PRIMARY = '#ffffff'
TEXT_SECONDARY = '#b0b3c1'
BORDER_COLOR = '#00d4ff'

# 设置背景色
rect_bg = Rectangle((0, 0), width, height, facecolor=BG_DARK, edgecolor='none')
ax.add_patch(rect_bg)

# ===== 1. 顶部导航栏 =====
navbar_height = 80
rect_navbar = FancyBboxPatch((0, height-navbar_height), width, navbar_height, 
                             boxstyle='round,pad=0', facecolor=BG_ACCENT, 
                             edgecolor=BORDER_COLOR, linewidth=2)
ax.add_patch(rect_navbar)

# 导航栏文字（简化版，后面用PIL添加）
ax.text(60, height-40, 'VALORANT STATS', fontsize=28, weight='bold', 
        color=COLOR_BLUE, fontfamily='monospace')
ax.text(width-300, height-40, 'Profile | Stats | Agents | Settings', fontsize=12, 
        color=TEXT_SECONDARY, fontfamily='monospace', ha='right')

# ===== 2. 玩家基本信息卡片 =====
card_x, card_y = 40, height-280
card_w, card_h = 400, 180
rect_player = FancyBboxPatch((card_x, card_y), card_w, card_h, 
                            boxstyle='round,pad=10', facecolor=BG_CARD,
                            edgecolor=COLOR_BLUE, linewidth=2)
ax.add_patch(rect_player)

# 玩家信息内容
ax.text(card_x+20, card_y+card_h-30, 'PLAYER PROFILE', fontsize=14, weight='bold',
        color=COLOR_BLUE, fontfamily='monospace')
ax.text(card_x+20, card_y+card_h-70, 'PlayerName#NA1', fontsize=18, weight='bold',
        color=TEXT_PRIMARY, fontfamily='monospace')
ax.text(card_x+20, card_y+card_h-110, 'Rank: Immortal 2  •  RR: 87', fontsize=12,
        color=COLOR_GOLD, fontfamily='monospace')
ax.text(card_x+20, card_y+card_h-150, 'Win Rate: 56.2%  •  K/D: 1.24', fontsize=11,
        color=TEXT_SECONDARY, fontfamily='monospace')

# ===== 3. 近期战绩统计卡片 =====
card_x2 = 480, height-280
card_w2, card_h2 = 380, 180
rect_stats = FancyBboxPatch((card_x2[0], card_y), card_w2, card_h2,
                           boxstyle='round,pad=10', facecolor=BG_CARD,
                           edgecolor=COLOR_PURPLE, linewidth=2)
ax.add_patch(rect_stats)

ax.text(card_x2[0]+20, card_y+card_h2-30, 'RECENT PERFORMANCE', fontsize=14, weight='bold',
        color=COLOR_PURPLE, fontfamily='monospace')
ax.text(card_x2[0]+20, card_y+card_h2-70, 'Last 10 Matches', fontsize=12,
        color=TEXT_SECONDARY, fontfamily='monospace')
ax.text(card_x2[0]+20, card_y+card_h2-110, 'Wins: 7  |  Losses: 3  |  Streak: 3W', fontsize=12,
        color=COLOR_BLUE, fontfamily='monospace')
ax.text(card_x2[0]+20, card_y+card_h2-150, 'Avg Kills: 18.3  |  Avg Deaths: 14.2', fontsize=11,
        color=TEXT_SECONDARY, fontfamily='monospace')

# ===== 4. 排名分布进度条 =====
rank_y = card_y - 140
ax.text(40, rank_y+80, 'RANK DISTRIBUTION', fontsize=14, weight='bold',
        color=COLOR_BLUE, fontfamily='monospace')

ranks = ['Iron', 'Bronze', 'Silver', 'Gold', 'Platinum', 'Diamond', 'Immortal', 'Radiant']
values = [5, 12, 22, 35, 45, 28, 18, 5]
bar_y = rank_y
bar_width = 1600
bar_height = 12

for i, (rank, val) in enumerate(zip(ranks, values)):
    y_pos = bar_y - (i * 25)
    # 背景条
    rect_bar_bg = Rectangle((140, y_pos), bar_width/2, bar_height, 
                           facecolor=BG_ACCENT, edgecolor=TEXT_SECONDARY, linewidth=1)
    ax.add_patch(rect_bar_bg)
    # 进度条
    bar_val = (val / max(values)) * (bar_width/2)
    rect_bar = Rectangle((140, y_pos), bar_val, bar_height,
                        facecolor=COLOR_PURPLE if i % 2 == 0 else COLOR_BLUE)
    ax.add_patch(rect_bar)
    # 文字
    ax.text(50, y_pos+6, rank, fontsize=10, color=TEXT_SECONDARY, fontfamily='monospace', va='center')
    ax.text(140 + bar_width/2 + 20, y_pos+6, f'{val}%', fontsize=10, color=TEXT_PRIMARY, fontfamily='monospace', va='center')

# ===== 5. 代理人使用数据 =====
agent_y = rank_y - 250
ax.text(40, agent_y+100, 'TOP AGENTS', fontsize=14, weight='bold',
        color=COLOR_GOLD, fontfamily='monospace')

agents = ['Jett', 'Reyna', 'Phoenix', 'Sova', 'Viper']
play_times = [156, 134, 92, 78, 64]
win_rates = [58.3, 61.2, 52.1, 49.8, 45.6]

for i, (agent, plays, wr) in enumerate(zip(agents, play_times, win_rates)):
    x_pos = 60 + (i * 320)
    y_base = agent_y
    
    # 代理人卡片
    rect_agent = FancyBboxPatch((x_pos, y_base-120), 300, 120,
                               boxstyle='round,pad=8', facecolor=BG_CARD,
                               edgecolor=COLOR_BLUE if i % 2 == 0 else COLOR_PURPLE, linewidth=2)
    ax.add_patch(rect_agent)
    
    # 代理人名称
    ax.text(x_pos+20, y_base-20, agent, fontsize=14, weight='bold',
            color=TEXT_PRIMARY, fontfamily='monospace')
    # 游玩时间
    ax.text(x_pos+20, y_base-60, f'Matches: {plays}', fontsize=10,
            color=TEXT_SECONDARY, fontfamily='monospace')
    # 胜率
    ax.text(x_pos+20, y_base-100, f'W/R: {wr}%', fontsize=11, weight='bold',
            color=COLOR_GOLD, fontfamily='monospace')

# ===== 底部装饰线条 =====
ax.plot([40, width-40], [40, 40], color=COLOR_BLUE, linewidth=2, alpha=0.5)
ax.text(width/2, 10, '© 2026 VALORANT STATS TRACKER - POWERED BY YOUR GAME DATA', 
        fontsize=9, color=TEXT_SECONDARY, ha='center', fontfamily='monospace', style='italic')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('/Users/lzz/Desktop/valorant_stats_design.png', dpi=96, 
            facecolor=BG_DARK, edgecolor='none', bbox_inches='tight', pad_inches=0)
plt.close()

print('✅ Valorant Stats Design PNG 已生成！')
print('📍 保存路径: /Users/lzz/Desktop/valorant_stats_design.png')
print('📐 尺寸: 1920x1080')
print('🎨 风格: 深色科幻电竞风格，青蓝+紫色高光')

  "params": {
    "language": "python",
    "code": "#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
from matplotlib.patches import Rectangle
import numpy as np
from io import BytesIO

# 设置设计尺寸 - 精确 1920x1080
WIDTH, HEIGHT = 1920, 1080
DPI = 100

# Valorant 配色方案
DARK_BG = (12, 13, 18)  # 极深蓝黑
CARD_BG = (20, 22, 30)  # 深卡片背景
PRIMARY_CYAN = (0, 232, 255)  # 青蓝高光
SECONDARY_PURPLE = (200, 60, 255)  # 紫色高光
TEXT_PRIMARY = (255, 255, 255)  # 白色文字
TEXT_SECONDARY = (160, 160, 180)  # 灰色副文字
ACCENT_RED = (255, 60, 100)  # 红色强调

# 创建主图像
img = Image.new('RGBA', (WIDTH, HEIGHT), DARK_BG + (255,))
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)

# ==================== 顶部导航栏 ====================
# 导航栏背景（带渐变效果用矩形）
draw.rectangle([(0, 0), (WIDTH, 80)], fill=(15, 16, 22, 255))
# 导航栏底部边框线（青蓝色）
draw.line([(0, 80), (WIDTH, 80)], fill=PRIMARY_CYAN + (100,), width=2)

# Logo 和标题
try:
    font_title = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 32)
    font_nav = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 14)
    font_large = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 28)
    font_medium = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 18)
    font_small = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 12)
except:
    font_title = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_nav = font_title
    font_large = font_title
    font_medium = font_title
    font_small = font_title

# VALORANT STATS 标题
draw.text((50, 25), "VALORANT STATS", fill=PRIMARY_CYAN + (255,), font=font_title)
# 导航菜单
draw.text((1100, 30), "Dashboard", fill=TEXT_PRIMARY + (255,), font=font_nav)
draw.text((1300, 30), "Agents", fill=TEXT_SECONDARY + (255,), font=font_nav)
draw.text((1450, 30), "Matches", fill=TEXT_SECONDARY + (255,), font=font_nav)
draw.text((1600, 30), "Leaderboard", fill=TEXT_SECONDARY + (255,), font=font_nav)

# ==================== 玩家基本信息卡片（左上） ====================
card1_x, card1_y = 40, 110
card1_w, card1_h = 560, 280

# 卡片背景
draw.rectangle([(card1_x, card1_y), (card1_x + card1_w, card1_y + card1_h)], 
               fill=CARD_BG + (255,), outline=PRIMARY_CYAN + (80,), width=2)

# 卡片标题
draw.text((card1_x + 20, card1_y + 15), "Player Profile", fill=PRIMARY_CYAN + (255,), font=font_large)
# 分隔线
draw.line([(card1_x + 20, card1_y + 50), (card1_x + card1_w - 20, card1_y + 50)], 
          fill=PRIMARY_CYAN + (50,), width=1)

# 玩家信息
y_offset = card1_y + 70
draw.text((card1_x + 20, y_offset), "Player ID: xXProGamer420Xx", fill=TEXT_PRIMARY + (255,), font=font_medium)
draw.text((card1_x + 20, y_offset + 40), "Current Rank: Radiant", fill=SECONDARY_PURPLE + (255,), font=font_medium)
draw.text((card1_x + 20, y_offset + 80), "RR: 247 / 500", fill=TEXT_SECONDARY + (255,), font=font_small)
# RR 进度条
draw.rectangle([(card1_x + 20, y_offset + 100), (card1_x + card1_w - 20, y_offset + 115)], 
               fill=(40, 45, 60, 255))
draw.rectangle([(card1_x + 20, y_offset + 100), (card1_x + 20 + 150, y_offset + 115)], 
               fill=SECONDARY_PURPLE + (255,))

draw.text((card1_x + 20, y_offset + 130), "Wins: 542 | Losses: 198 | WR: 73.2%", fill=PRIMARY_CYAN + (255,), font=font_small)

# ==================== 近期战绩统计（右上） ====================
card2_x, card2_y = 1320, 110
card2_w, card2_h = 560, 280

draw.rectangle([(card2_x, card2_y), (card2_x + card2_w, card2_y + card2_h)], 
               fill=CARD_BG + (255,), outline=SECONDARY_PURPLE + (80,), width=2)

draw.text((card2_x + 20, card2_y + 15), "Recent Matches", fill=SECONDARY_PURPLE + (255,), font=font_large)
draw.line([(card2_x + 20, card2_y + 50), (card2_x + card2_w - 20, card2_y + 50)], 
          f

# ==================== 玩家基本信息卡片（左上） ====================
card1_x, card1_y = 40, 110
card1_w, card1_h = 560, 280

# 卡片背景
draw.rectangle([(card1_x, card1_y), (card1_x + card1_w, card1_y + card1_h)], 
               fill=CARD_BG + (255,), outline=PRIMARY_CYAN + (80,), width=2)

# 卡片标题
draw.text((card1_x + 20, card1_y + 15), "Player Profile", fill=PRIMARY_CYAN + (255,), font=font_large)
# 分隔线
draw.line([(card1_x + 20, card1_y + 50), (card1_x + card1_w - 20, card1_y + 50)], 
          fill=PRIMARY_CYAN + (50,), width=1)

# 玩家信息
y_offset = card1_y + 70
draw.text((card1_x + 20, y_offset), "Player ID: xXProGamer420Xx", fill=TEXT_PRIMARY + (255,), font=font_medium)
draw.text((card1_x + 20, y_offset + 40), "Current Rank: Radiant", fill=SECONDARY_PURPLE + (255,), font=font_medium)
draw.text((card1_x + 20, y_offset + 80), "RR: 247 / 500", fill=TEXT_SECONDARY + (255,), font=font_small)
# RR 进度条
draw.rectangle([(card1_x + 20, y_offset + 100), (card1_x + card1_w - 20, y_offset + 115)], 
               fill=(40, 45, 60, 255))
draw.rectangle([(card1_x + 20, y_offset + 100), (card1_x + 20 + 150, y_offset + 115)], 
               fill=SECONDARY_PURPLE + (255,))

draw.text((card1_x + 20, y_offset + 130), "Wins: 542 | Losses: 198 | WR: 73.2%", fill=PRIMARY_CYAN + (255,), font=font_small)
